APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIHALY, SHAYLA HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SHAYLA MIHALY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 430.10(E) IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE AS DAMAGES ONLY THE ALLEGED UNPAID RENT AND HOLDOVER DAMAGES, IF ANY. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) AND CCP AND CRC, INCLUDING CRC 3.1320 & 3.1322 AND CCP 430.60 AND 437 RELATING TO PROPERLY NOTICING AND SERVING DEMURRERS AND MOTIONS TO STRIKE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR # 5153

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SHAYLA MIHALY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT PUR SUANT TO CCP 1174(B) PRAYER FOR STATUTORY PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AFTER SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ORDER TO PLEAD, IF POSSIBLE, SPECIFIC FACTS WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) AND CCP AND CRC, INCLUDING CRC 3.1320 & 3.1322 AND CCP 430.60 AND 437 RELATING TO PROPERLY NOTICING AND SERVING DEMURRERS AND MOTIONS TO STRIKE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR # 5153

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT SHAYLA MIHALY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT pursuant to CCP 430.10(e) is sustained with 5 days leave to amend to allege as damages only the alleged unpaid rent and holdover damages, if any. Counsel for Plaintiff is directed to read and comply with Local Rule 2.6(b) and CCP and CRC, including CRC 3.1320 & 3.1322 and CCP 430.60 and 437 relating to properly noticing and serving demurrers and motions to strike. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 = (301/MJM)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT SHAYLA MIHALY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 1174(b) prayer for statutory punitive damages is sustained with 5 days leave to amend after service of notice of order to plead, if possible, specific facts with requisite particularity.
Counsel for Plaintiff is directed to read and comply with Local Rule 2.6(b) and CCP and CRC, including CRC 3.1320 & 3.1322 and CCP 430.60 and 437 relating to properly noticing and serving demurrers and motions to strike. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 = (301/MJM)
